case_title: THE CITY TOW VS MORRISON, DYLAN MARTAN.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT MORRISON, DYLAN MARTAN. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORRISON, DYLAN MARTAN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRISON, DYLAN MARTAN. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-18-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-29-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED.IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 11/29/01, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
